MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-22-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANTS MENZIES AVIATION (USA) INC., AIRCRAFT SERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC., AND MODESTO C. COMPAS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND RELATED DATES AND DEADLINES WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY IVY NOWINSKI, ESQ. FOR MOVING PARTY DEFENDANTS AND BABAK KHEIRI, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF DEFENDANTS' MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND REQUIRED DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL TO PAY A $60 FILING FEE ONLINE/E-FILE IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION ON CONDITION THAT COUNSEL PAY THE $60 MOTION FILING FEE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/30/20 IS CONTINUED TO 06/01/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENSE COUNSEL TO SERVE PARTIES. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
